title: Plan URL-only report generation
objective: Create the next cross-repo, UI-primary planning unit for additive URL-only Product Signal Report generation with API-first delivery and a future guarded UI mode toggle.

include: Document the current UI requirement for pasted evidence.
Document the current API requirement for non-empty items[] in POST /api/analysis-jobs.
Define the additive API-first contract direction for supported URL-only flows.
Define the future UI mode toggle and fallback manual-evidence behavior.
Preserve backward compatibility for current API and extension clients.
Update AI delivery state and planning records.
exclude: Markdown export, feedback, or routing changes.
Inventing a new endpoint without checked-in evidence.

done: The current UI and API constraints are documented as hard blockers for true URL-only submission.
The additive API-first contract direction is defined without inventing a new endpoint.
The future UI mode toggle behavior is decision-complete.
Backward compatibility for the extension and existing analysis-job clients is preserved.
AI delivery state and planning records are updated.
